recipe.startFreshSubtitle: Start fresh with AI or manual entry

recipe.pasteAreaPlaceholder:
Paste your recipe text here...

Example:
Spicy Garlic Noodles

Ingredients:
- 8 oz rice noodles
- 4 cloves garlic, minced
- 2 tbsp soy sauce
...

Instructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package
2. Saute garlic until fragrant
...

topbar.toastSignOutFailed: Couldn't fully sign out — clearing local session

onboarding.ipSubtitle: Pick cuisines you love — we'll personalize your feed.
onboarding.ipTitleNew: What do you love to cook?
onboarding.ipSubtitleEdit: Select your favorite cuisines to personalize your recipe feed.
onboarding.ipSubtitleNew: Pick a few cuisines to personalize your recipe feed. You can always change these later in settings.
onboarding.ipSkipConfirmDesc: Without your preferences, your recipe feed won't be personalized. You can always set them later in {settingsPath}.
onboarding.ipToastPersonalize: Great taste! We'll personalize your feed.
onboarding.ipToastSaveError: Couldn't save preferences. Tap Continue to try again.
onboarding.ipToastConnectionError: Couldn't save preferences. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.csFeedPersonalized: Your feed is now personalized based on your preferences.
onboarding.hint_explore_recipes_desc: Browse thousands of recipes from our community. Filter by cuisine, difficulty, or cooking time to find your perfect dish.
onboarding.hint_search_bar_desc: Looking for something specific? Press "/" or tap the search icon to find recipes, cooks, or posts instantly.
onboarding.hint_start_cooking_desc: Tap "Cook" on any recipe to enter guided cooking mode. You'll get step-by-step instructions with auto-synced timers - perfect for keeping your hands free.
onboarding.hint_cook_mode_timers_desc: Each cooking step has its own timer. They start automatically and will alert you when done - even if your screen is off or you switch apps.
onboarding.hint_cook_mode_voice_desc: Messy hands? Say "next step" or "previous step" to navigate without touching your device. Enable the microphone in cook mode to try it.
onboarding.hint_cook_mode_complete_desc: Every completed cook earns you XP and builds your streak. Snap a photo of your dish to share your creation with the community!
onboarding.hint_earn_xp_desc: Complete cooking sessions to earn XP. More complex recipes = more XP. Level up to unlock badges, titles, and show off your cooking journey.
onboarding.hint_streaks_desc: Cook something every day to build a streak. Longer streaks mean bonus XP multipliers and exclusive streak badges. Don't break the chain!
onboarding.hint_levels_badges_desc: As you gain XP, you'll level up and earn badges for milestones like "First Recipe", "5-Day Streak", or "Pasta Master". Check your profile to see them all.
onboarding.hint_leaderboard_desc: See how you rank among other home cooks. The leaderboard resets weekly, so everyone has a chance to shine.
onboarding.hint_following_desc: Follow chefs whose recipes inspire you. The "Following" tab in your feed shows only content from people you follow.
onboarding.hint_share_creations_desc: After cooking, snap a photo of your dish and share it as a post. Your followers can like, comment, and save your creations.
onboarding.hint_community_desc: The Community page is where you'll find trending posts, discover new cooks to follow, and see what others are making.
onboarding.hint_create_recipe_desc: Got a recipe to share? Tap Create to add your own. You can type it manually or use AI to generate steps from a photo or description.
onboarding.hint_create_post_desc: Want to share without a full recipe? Create a post to share photos, tips, or cooking wins with the community.
onboarding.hint_pantry_desc: Track ingredients you have at home. When you mark items in your pantry, we'll suggest recipes you can make right now.
onboarding.hint_shopping_list_desc: Tap "Add to Shopping List" on any recipe to automatically add its ingredients. Lists sync across devices and can be shared with family.
onboarding.hint_challenges_desc: Take on themed cooking challenges to earn bonus XP and exclusive badges. New challenges drop every week.
onboarding.hint_dashboard_feed_desc: This is your home base. We'll show you recipes and posts based on your interests, people you follow, and what's trending.
onboarding.hint_tonights_pick_desc: Not sure what to cook? We suggest a recipe each day based on your preferences and what you haven't tried yet.

welcome.heroDescription: ChefKix turns every recipe into an adventure. Earn XP, unlock badges, build streaks, and compete with friends — all while mastering real cooking skills.
welcome.featureXpDesc: Every dish you cook earns XP. Level up from Kitchen Newbie to Master Chef and unlock exclusive recipes and badges.
welcome.featureStreaksDesc: Cook consistently to build epic streaks. Lose them and everyone on your leaderboard knows — pressure creates diamonds.
welcome.featureCookingDesc: Step-by-step HUD with hands-free voice navigation. Chef tips, timing cues, and visual guides keep you on track.
welcome.featureFriendsDesc: Challenge friends to cook-offs, climb the weekly leaderboard, and show off your culinary achievements.
welcome.featureQualityDesc: AI-powered quality ratings from Foolproof to Expert. Find your level and grow at your own pace.
welcome.featureCreatorDesc: Share your recipes and track performance. See who is cooking your dishes and earn XP when they succeed.
welcome.whyDifferentSubtitle: Not another recipe app. A complete cooking RPG where your skills actually matter.
welcome.step01Desc: Browse 10K+ recipes filtered by difficulty, time, and your taste profile. Every recipe shows its quality score.
welcome.step02Desc: Hands-free HUD guides you through each step. Voice commands, timers, and chef tips keep you on track.
welcome.step03Desc: Complete the recipe to earn XP, build your streak, and unlock badges. Share your creation with the community.
welcome.step04Desc: Track your progress, compete on leaderboards, and unlock harder recipes as you master techniques.
welcome.howItWorksSubtitle: Four simple steps to transform your kitchen into a gaming arena
welcome.ctaDescription: Join 50,000+ home chefs turning every meal into an achievement. Free forever.
welcome.ctaDisclaimer: No credit card required • Free forever • Cancel anytime

landing.heroDescription: Discover recipes, track your cooking journey, earn XP, and fall back in love with your kitchen.
landing.smartTimersDesc: Auto-synced timers for every step. Never burn dinner again.
landing.earnXpDesc: Level up your cooking skills with real achievements.
landing.stepByStepDesc: Interactive cook mode guides you through each recipe.
landing.beFirstToTrend: Be the first to cook and trend!
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to cook better
landing.cookModeGuides: Cook mode guides you step by step
landing.neverLosePlaceDesc: Never lose your place or miss a step. Try it out:
landing.demoInstruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook according to package directions until al dente.
landing.timerModalDesc: In the real app, this timer would count down and notify you when your pasta is ready.
landing.neverForgetTimer: You'll never forget a timer again
landing.signUpToCook: Sign up to start cooking for real
landing.bottomCtaDesc: Pick a recipe. Cook something new. See how good it feels to make a real meal.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Cook your first recipe in 5 minutes.
landing.copyright: © {year} ChefKix. Made with love and butter.
landing.launchBanner: 🔥 ChefKix is live — Join the tastiest cooking community!
